description_long: This office building features a rectangular, two-story structure with a facade clad in light-colored stonework. Large, grid-patterned windows dominate the front and side elevations, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces, which are visible through the glass. The main entrance is marked by a single door with a 'Welcome' mat, flanked by symmetrical window arrangements. The rear and one side of the building are more austere, with minimal window openings and uninterrupted stone surfaces. The interior appears to be organized with open-plan workspaces, bookshelves, and modern furnishings. The overall design is clean and functional, reflecting a contemporary urban office aesthetic.
description: A two-story office building with a stone facade, large grid windows, and a prominent single-door entrance, featuring modern interior workspaces visible through the glass.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large grid windows, and a glimpse of the interior workspace.
description_view_1: Rear view with a mostly solid stone wall and a single large window, minimal architectural detailing.
description_view_2: Side view with a single large window and a mostly blank stone wall, showing part of the interior layout.
description_view_3: Alternate front view highlighting the entrance door, symmetrical window arrangement, and 'Welcome' mat.
attribute_window_pattern: Regularly spaced, large rectangular grid windows on the front and side elevations; minimal windows on the rear and one side.
